name: FUNERAL_COVER
description: Required for configuration of a funeral product

name: PREMIUM_HOLIDAY
description: Premium holiday benefit

name: PRODUCT_LEVEL_ESCALATIONS
description: Escalations at the product level i.e., do not vary by model point

name: AGE_RATED_ESCALATIONS
description: Indicates the use of the projected AgeNextBirthday to read the ProductLevelEscalation table; otherwise, Age@Entry is used throughout the projection period

name: WHOLE_OF_LIFE
description: Whole of Life

name: NON_LIFE
description: Non Life Product

name: SA_FIXED_BASE_LUMP_SUM
description: Fixed Base Lump Sum. Added in the model point file as Sum Assured

name: STANDARD_ADDITIONAL_LUMP_SUM
description: lump sum payable over and above the base lump sum on death of the life assured. Not Optional

name: RIDER_BENEFIT
description: OPTIONAL benefit(s) payable over and above the base SA.Rider table required

name: ACCIDENTAL_DEATH_BENEFIT
description: Funeral: A multiple of the base SA is payable in the event of the accidental death

name: LAPSE_DEPENDENT_ON_CP_DEATH
description: Funeral: A policy lapse dependent on the contract party's death

name: CASH_BACK_SURVIVAL
description: Return of proportion of premiums on survival

name: CASH_BACK_ON_DEATH
description: Return of proportion of premiums on death

name: DEATH_BENEFIT
description: Covers natural death benefit if accidental death benefit is selected otherwise it covers both natural and accidental deaths

name: CREDIT_LIFE
description: Required for configuration of a credit Life product

name: SA_OUTSTANDING_LOAN
description: Outstanding Loan Amount as Sum Assured

name: CREDIT_LIFE_FLAT_PREMIUM
description: Credit Life: Premium as a percentage of the Original Loan Amount

name: CREDIT_LIFE_DECREASING_PREMIUM
description: Credit Life: Premium as a percentage of the Outstanding Loan Amount

name: OS_PROJ_PV_METHOD
description: Credit Life: First Principle projection of the O/S Amount. Else provided amounts used for projection.

name: RETRENCHMENT_BENEFIT
description: Benefit payable on retrenchment

name: PERMANENT_DISABILITY_BENEFIT
description: Permanent Disability Benefit

name: TEMPORARY_DISABILITY_BENEFIT
description: Benefit payable on temporary disability

name: CREDIT_LIFE_FUNERAL_OPTION
description: Credit Life: Funeral Benefit Payable on Death

name: PROPORTIONAL_REINSURANCE
description: Proportional Reinsurance: Quota and/or Surplus Reinsurance

name: JOINT_LIFE
description: Joint Life Coverage

name: ANNUITY_INCOME
description: Regular income payable while alive

name: ANNUITY_CALENDAR_MONTH_ESCALATIONS
description: Annuity Income: annual escalations in a given model point calendar month

name: FULLY_PAIDUP
description: Premium payment reduced to zero. SA adjusted accordingly.

name: REDUCED_PAIDUP
description: Premium payment reduced to non-zero and SA adjusted accordingly

name: PREMIUM_WAIVER_ON_DEATH
description: Premium payment waived on death

name: SURRENDER_BENEFIT
description: Benefit Payable on Surrender

name: MATURITY_BENEFIT
description: Benefit Payable upon Maturity

name: UNIT_FUND
description: Unit Linked Product

name: WITH_PROFIT
description: Policyholder participation in generated underwriting profits

name: FUND_RISK_CHARGE
description: Risk Charge Expensed from the Unit Fund

name: ADVISORY_FEE_CHARGE
description: Advisory Fee Expensed from the Unit Fund

name: CRITICAL_ILLNESS_BENEFIT
description: Benefit payable at the diagnosis of a pre-defined critical illness

name: PREMIUM_WAIVER_ON_DISABILITY
description: Premium payment waived on disability

name: SPECIAL_DECREMENT_MARGIN
description: Special decrement margins

name: RENEWABLE_PROFIT_ADJUSTMENT
description: Profit adjustment for renewable products

name: SURRENDER_VALUE_QUADRATIC_FORMULA
description: Surrender Value Quadratic formula

name: MATURITY_BENEFIT_PATTERN
description: Maturity Benefit Instalments or Pattern
